Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Output Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers dominating the momentum rankings. EACO leads at rank 1 with a composite score of 95.1, driven by extraordinary long-term returns (164.96% over one year) and near-perfect ratio consistency (4 of 5 ratio passes), though it shows an unusual -173.56 ratio spike between 1-week and 1-day returns suggesting extreme short-term volatility. ATEX follows closely with similar structural strength—also passing 4 ratio gates and posting massive 6-month returns (231.54%)—but distinguishes itself with a superior bad_spy_score of 0.6305 compared to EACO's 2.4029, indicating ATEX held up better during market downturns. Both tickers pass all four moving average gates (SMA30/50/100/200), suggesting they are trading well above their medium and long-term trend lines. The data shows a pattern where these top-ranked candidates combine sustained uptrends across multiple timeframes with proportional step-increases in returns, which the dashboard scores as reliable momentum signals worth monitoring.
